/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/gcode.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/gcodeparse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/iocontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/positioncalc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/programrun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/stepper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/vfdcontrol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/globalcommunication.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/clidisplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/gcodeinterface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pi-cnc.dir/main.cpp.o -o pi-cnc  -lcurses /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libform.so -lwiringPi
